dates.summary: ByteDance Seed surfaced the clearest product artifact of the day with Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and a new Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM aimed at more natural, interruption-tolerant voice interaction. Hugging Face also launched an agentic robotics app store tied to 10,000 Reachy Mini devices, signaling a push to create a software distribution layer for embodied AI. On the research side, two new arXiv papers advanced interpretability and training theory, but neither yet offers independently replicated benchmark gains or production-ready results.
